upstream_main_recent_commits.subject: Handle Gemma4 bidirectional visual prefill (#340)
upstream_main_recent_commits.reason: Local branch already carries equivalent Gemma4 bidirectional visual prefill handling in #1190/#340-adjacent patches; not a new isolated performance candidate.

upstream_main_recent_commits.subject: Disable Qwen ragged attention kernel (#338)
upstream_main_recent_commits.reason: Correctness/stability patch for Qwen ragged attention, not a new latency candidate for the retained M29 direct benchmark lane.

upstream_main_recent_commits.subject: Clear Qwen text rope state before VLM prefill (#333)
upstream_main_recent_commits.reason: Correctness patch on a path already represented by local Qwen VLM work; no narrow measurable follow-up selected.

upstream_main_recent_commits.subject: Add disk-based caching and continuous batching for VLMs (#326)
upstream_main_recent_commits.reason: This branch has an extended local batched VLM prompt-cache stack and follow-up benchmark evidence; cherry-picking the mainline base would conflict with local design.

upstream_main_recent_commits.subject: Add prompt caching checkpoints for sequential generation (#308)
upstream_main_recent_commits.reason: Sequential checkpointing is covered by the local prompt-cache lineage and later #1190 evidence.

branch_triage.scope: 17 commits, 868 insertions, new mlx_engine/tool_runtime.py, tool protocol support, reasoning/tool guard tests
interesting_commits: 8bfa083 Optimize Gemma4 reasoning guard token tracking
branch_triage.reason: The apparent optimization commits depend on an upstream-only Gemma4 tool/runtime guard surface absent from this branch. Importing them would introduce feature semantics, not a contained prompt-processing or decode-latency patch. It also lacks a retained-suite benchmark target in the current #1190 lane.

branch_triage.scope: 13 commits, architecture rewrite relative to this branch; diff removes much of local batched VLM prompt-cache stack and introduces vision_add_ons/vision_model_kit paths
branch_triage.reason: Not compatible as a narrow patch. The diff is a broad parallel architecture and would invalidate current #1190 prompt-cache evidence before producing an isolated measurable hypothesis.

branch_triage.scope: large VLM parity/CI branch with overlapping batched VLM prompt-cache work
branch_triage.reason: Broad branch rather than a small candidate. Local branch already contains a deeper #1190 VLM prompt-cache stack and repeated benchmark evidence.

branch_triage.scope: single test commit on an upstream architecture base that is divergent from this branch
branch_triage.reason: Test-only upstream coverage; no runtime change and no direct latency hypothesis.

branch_triage.scope: 28 commits, distributed coordinator/rank/server/runtime work plus broad model-kit changes
branch_triage.reason: Distributed serving is broad infrastructure work and outside the current retained Mac-local direct benchmark promotion lane.

branch_triage.scope: distributed non-batched branch with large runtime changes
branch_triage.reason: Broad distributed runtime lane, not a contained local latency improvement.

decision.live_lm_studio_reason: No direct-code candidate passed upstream triage, so no promoted candidate exists to validate live.
decision.next_action: Continue with local low-write-amplification prompt-cache hypotheses or a future upstream scan when a branch exposes an isolated runtime patch against the retained direct benchmark lane.
